description_long: This is a medium-sized, trapezoidal handbag with a wide opening and a slightly tapered base. The exterior features a woven texture with a repeating diamond and zigzag pattern in natural beige and brown tones, giving it a rustic, artisanal appearance. Two sturdy, rounded handles are attached symmetrically to the top, allowing for easy carrying by hand or over the forearm. The bag's structure appears semi-rigid, maintaining its shape while still offering some flexibility. The interior is not visible, but the bag likely has a spacious single compartment suitable for carrying personal items. There are no visible logos, hardware, or decorative embellishments, emphasizing a minimalist, functional design.
description: A woven, beige and brown trapezoidal handbag with a diamond pattern and two rounded handles, exuding a rustic and minimalist style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full diamond-patterned face and both handles clearly attached at the top.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow profile and the thickness of the bag, with the handles visible from the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the same pattern and handle arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the slim side and handle alignment.
attribute_strap_type: Two fixed, medium-length rounded handles for hand or forearm carry; not adjustable.
attribute_closure_mechanism: No visible closure mechanism; likely an open-top design.
attribute_pattern: Diamond and zigzag geometric pattern in beige and brown.
